# Jomel Noriega — GoHighLevel CRM & Automation Specialist

> Portfolio of Jomel Noriega, a GoHighLevel specialist who helps service-based businesses turn GoHighLevel into a reliable growth engine — funnels, pipelines, CRM workflows, and SMS & email follow-up systems, from lead follow-up and appointment booking to customer communication.

## Pages

- [Home](https://jomelnoriega.com/): Overview of services, nine example GoHighLevel workflows with interactive diagrams, and the hero case study.
- [Smile Society case study](https://jomelnoriega.com/smile-society.html): A complete dental clinic booking funnel build — every screen and every workflow, with a live demo at https://smilesociety.online.
- [Nine workflows guide (PDF)](https://jomelnoriega.com/nine-workflows-guide.pdf): A downloadable guide to the nine core automation workflows.

## Contact

- Email: hello@jomelnoriega.com
- Book a discovery call via the site's contact section at https://jomelnoriega.com/
